rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE INNOCENTE CASSOLATO TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement Pursuant To Ccp 664.6 And For Sanctions Attorneys Fees Pursuant To Ccp 128.6
rulings.Rulings: Jean Judnick's Motion to Enforce Settlement Pursuant to C.C.P. Section 664.6 is granted. No opposition was filed. The Court will enter judgment on the terms of the settlement agreement executed on July 6, 2015. Jean Judnick's request for sanctions / attorney's fees is denied. The Court does not find that Carol Cassalato's lack of compliance constitutes "bad-faith actions or tactics that are frivolous or solely intended to cause delay" as set forth in C.C.P. Section 128.6. The prevailing party must submit a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the court and opposing counsel no later than June 21, 2016, at 4:00 p.m.
